summary: Tested Titelli Marketplace Influencer Module & Refactoring. Fixed 2 bugs: 1) React Hook naming issue in InvitationsSection (useQuickQuestion → handleQuickQuestion), 2) InfluencersSection data parsing issue (API returns {influencers: [...]} not array). Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All extracted components working.
critical_code_review_comments: EnterpriseDashboard.js has ESLint warning: useEffect missing dependency 'fetchAllData' - consider adding eslint-disable comment or fixing
Refactoring successful: IAClientsSection, InfluencersSection, InvitationsSection, SubscriptionsSection extracted to /app/frontend/src/components/dashboard/
All extracted components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data. Test influencer users created during tests are auto-cleaned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Influencer module fully tested. Registration with 3 user types (Client, Entreprise, Influencer) working. Influencer form has Instagram/TikTok/Facebook fields. Enterprise Dashboard refactoring verified - all extracted components (IAClientsSection, InfluencersSection, InvitationsSection, SubscriptionsSection) load correctly. APIs tested: /api/auth/register (influencer), /api/influencer/profile (GET/PUT), /api/influencers, /api/enterprise/ia-campaigns, /api/enterprise/invitations, /api/enterprise/influencer-collaborations.

features_tested.auth_page_3_options: ✓ Registration page shows Client, Entreprise, Influencer options
features_tested.influencer_form: ✓ Influencer form has Instagram, TikTok, Facebook fields + category dropdown
features_tested.influencer_profile_api: ✓ GET/PUT /api/influencer/profile works (creates profile if none exists)
features_tested.enterprise_dashboard: ✓ Dashboard loads after refactoring (reduced from 3807 to 2699 lines)
features_tested.ia_clients_section: ✓ IAClientsSection component renders with campaigns and stats
features_tested.influencers_section: ✓ InfluencersSection component renders with 8 influencers, filters, collaborations
features_tested.invitations_section: ✓ InvitationsSection component renders with stats and suggestive questions

bug_1.issue: React Hook 'useQuickQuestion' cannot be called inside a callback
bug_1.fix: Renamed function from useQuickQuestion to handleQuickQuestion (line 80 and 142)

bug_2.issue: filteredInfluencers.map is not a function - API returns object not array
bug_2.fix: Changed line 28 to extract influencers array: influencersRes.data?.influencers || influencersRes.data || []
